---
title: "Get started"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: true
---

## Goal

State the user outcome of this guide in one paragraph.

## Prerequisites

- R version requirement
- package installation

## Install

```{r}
#| eval: false
# install.packages("REPO")
```

## Happy path workflow

```{r}
#| eval: false
# library(REPO)
# data <- example_data()
# result <- run_workflow(data)
# print(result)
```

## Interpret results

Explain how to read the main outputs.

## Where to go next

- advanced workflow article
- FAQ article
- function reference page
